Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: CNN has decided not to run a Donald Trump endorsed campaign ad after the network decided

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: it does not meet their standards.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: The 32nd advertisement paid for by Trump's campaign targeted Joe Biden's conduct toward

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Ukraine while he served as vice president, while also referring to CNN personalities Don

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Lemon, Chris Cuomo, and Jim Acosta as media lap dogs.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: A CNN spokesperson spoke to THR saying the ad does not meet the network's advertising

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: standards, adding, in addition to disparaging CNN and its journalists, the ad makes assertions

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: that have been proven demonstrably false by various news outlets, including CNN.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: However, despite CNN's rejection, the president posted the advertisement onto his Twitter

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: page last week, along with the caption, I'm draining the swamp.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Now, this is not the first time CNN has rejected a Trump campaign ad.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Back in 2017, the network refused to run a Trump-approved ad called, Let President Trump

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: do his job, which criticized the media and specifically called out Lemon as well as Anderson
